# 代码健康看板模板 (Dashboard Template)

## 1. Dashboard 模板

```markdown
## 代码健康度看板 (Code Health Dashboard)

## 基本标识信息 (Identity)

- 生成工具 (Generated By): /code-health-dashboard
- 生成时间 (Generated At): <ISO 8601>
- 审计范围 (Scope): 项目库级 (repo) | 规格特征级 (feature) | 发版部署级 (release)
- 基线路径 (Baseline): <path or baseline missing>

## 信号摘要看板 (Signal Summary)
|  | 信号类型 (Signal) | 运行状态 (Status) | 数据分类 (Bucket) | 事实依据 (Evidence) | 是否强控阻断 (Blocking) | 跟踪路由 (Route) |  |
|  | -------- | -------- | -------- | ---------- | ---------- | ------- |  |
|  | 语法及风格检查 (lint) | PASS / FAIL / UNKNOWN / N/A | actual_pass | <path> | Yes / No | <route> |  |
|  | 类型检查 (typecheck) | PASS / FAIL / UNKNOWN / N/A | actual_pass | <path> | Yes / No | <route> |  |
|  | 单元测试 (unit tests) | PASS / FAIL / UNKNOWN / N/A | actual_pass | <path> | Yes / No | <route> |  |
|  | 集成与端到端测试 (integration / e2e) | PASS / FAIL / UNKNOWN / N/A | <bucket> | <path> | Yes / No | <route> |  |
|  | 代码覆盖率 (coverage) | PASS / FAIL / UNKNOWN / N/A | <bucket> | <path> | Yes / No | <route> |  |
|  | 依赖项漏洞与供应链风险 (dependency risk) | PASS / FAIL / UNKNOWN / N/A | <bucket> | <path> | Yes / No | <route> |  |
|  | 不稳定性与Flaky测试分析 (flaky) | PASS / FAIL / UNKNOWN / N/A | <bucket> | <path> | Yes / No | <route> |  |
|  | 复杂度与变更频率 (complexity / churn) | PASS / FAIL / UNKNOWN / N/A | <bucket> | <path> | Yes / No | <route> |  |
|  | 性能与响应水位 (performance health) | PASS / FAIL / UNKNOWN / N/A | <bucket> | <path> | Yes / No | <route> |  |
|  | 发版就绪质量门禁 (release gates) | PASS / FAIL / UNKNOWN / N/A | <bucket> | <path> | Yes / No | <route> |  |

## 演进趋势 (Trend)
|  | 监控指标 (Signal) | 历史版本 (Previous) | 当前状态 (Current) | 演进走向 (Direction) | 事实依据 (Evidence) |  |
|  | -------- | ---------- | --------- | ----------- | ---------- |  |
|  | 代码覆盖率 (coverage) | <value> | <value> | 改善 (improved) / 降级 (regressed) / 持平 (flat) / 未知 (unknown) | <path> |  |
|  | 失败用例数 (failures) | <value> | <value> | 改善 (improved) / 降级 (regressed) / 持平 (flat) / 未知 (unknown) | <path> |  |

## 最终结论 (Verdict)

- 看板就绪状态 (Dashboard State): READY / BLOCKED
- 强控阻断信号清单 (Blocking Signals): <None or list>
- 未知/缺失证据信号清单 (Unknown Signals): <None or list + route>

```

## 2. 结论判定规则 (Verdict Rules)

| 规则 ID (Rule ID) | 条件 | 结论 (Verdict) |
| --------- | ------ | --------- |
| DSH-R1 | 任一 blocking signal = FAIL | BLOCKED |
| DSH-R2 | blocking signal = UNKNOWN 且无 route | BLOCKED |
| DSH-R3 | 所有 blocking signals PASS/N/A，UNKNOWN 均有 route | READY |
| DSH-R4 | baseline missing 但当前 evidence 齐 | READY_WITH_BASELINE_MISSING |
| DSH-R5 | trend 声称无历史证据 | BLOCKED |

## 3. 健康分边界 (Health Score Boundary)

| 规则 ID (Rule ID) | 规则 | 原因 |
| --------- | ------ | ------ |
| HSC-R1 | 默认不输出百分制总分 | 避免把未知伪装成健康 |
| HSC-R2 | 如项目已有 score 公式，只引用项目公式 | 不自创治理口径 |
| HSC-R3 | UNKNOWN 不参与加分 | 缺证据不是好消息 |
| HSC-R4 | FAIL 必须保留原始 signal | 总分不能掩盖红灯 |

## 4. 路由汇总

| 条件 (Condition) | 目标路由 (Route) |
| ----------- | ------- |
| 缺失本地基线 (missing local baseline) | `/repo-safety-setup` |
| 缺失 CI 门禁 (missing CI gate) | `/ci-quality-gates` |
| 实现测试失败 (failing implementation tests) | `/specs-execute` |
| 系统性 bug 或未知的 Flaky 测试 (systemic bug or flaky unknown) | `/bug-audit` 或 `diagnose` |
| 发布就绪风险 (release readiness risk) | `/release-deploy` |
| 性能退化 (performance regression) | `/performance-reliability-audit` |
